approvalSource: Steve explicitly required Foundation system health fully green and auditor/source activation to wait until health rows are fixed or classified.
scopeSummary: Move system health to green by clearing safe rows and classifying every remaining non-green row with owner, reason, threshold, next action, and repair card routing.
constraints: Do not hide red/yellow rows by deleting them from system health.
No live Gmail, meeting-notes, meeting-transcript, auth-required, paid, provider, external-write, Drive mutation, or Agent Feedback send reruns.
Every remaining non-green row needs owner, reason, threshold, next action, and repair route.
Do not start source/extraction activation before health and audit cleanup are complete.
Do not launch parallel builders from this card.
